warden.voice: Formal, terse, speaks in obligations and duty. Short sentences. Military bearing softened by weariness.
warden.backstory: Has guarded the Hollow Gate for years. Knows why it was sealed but won't say unless trusted. Carries guilt about something he allowed to happen.

elena.voice: Pragmatic, transactional, uses merchant metaphors. Warm and generous when trusted, sharp when crossed.
elena.backstory: A survivor who turned to trade after the Hollow fell. Hides supply caches throughout the ruins. Wants stability more than power.

marcus.voice: Suspicious, military cadence, aggressive. Questions motives before listening. Respects strength and directness.
marcus.backstory: A garrison guard who never left his post. Watches the watchtower alone. Distrusts outsiders but desperately wants allies.

aria.voice: Intellectual, curious, evasive about motives. Uses scholarly language. Hides ambition behind academic detachment.
aria.backstory: A scholar who came to study the Hollow King's fall. Secretly believes the crown can be controlled and wants it for herself.

thorne.voice: Bitter, haunted, blunt. Short declarative sentences. Gallows humor. Talks about survival, not heroism.
thorne.backstory: Deserted the garrison when he discovered the truth about why they were really posted there. Lives with shame and anger.
speechPatterns: You don't know what it was like...
I sleep with one eye open...

vessa.voice: Mystical, cryptic, compassionate. Speaks in metaphors about stone and faith. Gentle but unflinching about hard truths.
vessa.backstory: A priestess who stayed when others fled. Tends a corrupted altar, believing the Hollow itself is sick, not evil.
speechPatterns: The old prayers don't work anymore...

hollow_king.voice: Imperious, ancient, tempting. Speaks with certainty and sorrow. Offers power while revealing its cost. Regal syntax.
hollow_king.backstory: An echo of the king who built the Hollow, now trapped between existence and oblivion. The crown corrupted him slowly.
speechPatterns: Power is not given, it is taken...

kael.voice: Gruff, practical, speaks through craft metaphors. Values work over words. Judges people by what they make, not what they say.
kael.backstory: The last forgemaster of the Hollow, who sealed the Ashen Gate himself. Knows how to unmake what he built -- but fears the consequences.
speechPatterns: You can't forge what you won't face...
The fire doesn't care about your reasons...

seren.voice: Charismatic, revolutionary, measured anger. Speaks for a community. Uses 'we' more than 'I'. Pragmatic idealist.
seren.backstory: Founded the Reforged from refugees who escaped the Hollow King's rule. Believes in building something new, not restoring what was.
